metadata.description: Govafy.com plugin marketplace. Currently lists the Unsolicited Proposal Kit; future plugins (solicited RFP responses, capability statements, SBIR/STTR drafting) will land here as they ship.

plugins.name: govafy-unsolicited-proposal-kit
plugins.description: Plan, draft, or review federal unsolicited proposals under FAR Subpart 15.6. Plain-English master guide, nine fictional-but-FAR-compliant sample proposals, four-mode interactive workflow, and a writing-rules sweep.
